marketing.name: PythonCLITools

marketing.name: TermKitCLI

marketing.name: PushGuard
marketing.tagline: Git push with confidence: secret scanning and sync checks.

seo.title: PushGuard — Git push safety with secret scanning and sync checks
seo.description: PushGuard is an open-source Git safety tool that scans for secrets before push and checks repository sync state to prevent accidental leaks.
seo.h1: PushGuard — Safe Git push with secret scanning
seo.problem: PushGuard helps developers avoid pushing secrets, credentials and unsafe changes by scanning commits before push and validating sync with the remote.
features: Safer release and team Git workflows

marketing.name: ai-context-cli
marketing.tagline: Turn any repository into reusable AI-ready context from your terminal.

tools.install_cmd: git clone https://github.com/mdwcoder/context-tool.git && cd context-tool && bash init.sh

marketing.tagline: Ultra-fast micro task manager for the terminal.

marketing.name: MemoryNoteCLI
marketing.tagline: Capture thoughts and snippets instantly, local-first, beautiful UI.

seo.title: MemoryNoteCLI — Local-first CLI notes and snippet capture
seo.description: MemoryNoteCLI is an open-source local-first CLI for capturing ideas, snippets and notes instantly with a polished terminal UI.
seo.h1: MemoryNoteCLI — Local-first notes from your terminal
seo.problem: MemoryNoteCLI helps developers capture ideas, snippets and quick notes without leaving the terminal, keeping everything local-first and easy to revisit.
features: Instant note and snippet capture from CLI
Polished terminal UI for daily use
Fast retrieval of ideas and fragments

tools.install_cmd: git clone https://github.com/mdwcoder/Work-CLI.git && cd Work-CLI && chmod +x init.sh && ./init.sh

marketing.name: FlowShotCLI
marketing.tagline: Capture, replay, and share your terminal workflows.

tools.install_cmd: git clone https://github.com/mdwcoder/FlowShotCLI.git && cd FlowShotCLI && pip install .

marketing.name: EasyRealBackend
marketing.tagline: FastAPI backend starter for VPS deployments with auth, RBAC, generated CRUD, and secure defaults.

tools.install_cmd: git clone https://github.com/mdwcoder/EasyRealBackend.git && cd EasyRealBackend && chmod +x init.sh scripts/*.sh && ./init.sh

seo.title: EasyRealBackend — Python backend starter with auth, roles and automatic CRUD
seo.description: EasyRealBackend is an open-source Python backend starter for VPS deployments, with user management, roles, permissions, security defaults and automatic CRUD endpoints.
seo.h1: EasyRealBackend — Python backend starter for secure VPS projects
seo.problem: EasyRealBackend helps developers launch secure Python backends faster by providing user management, authentication, role-based permissions, groups and automatic CRUD endpoints for custom tables.
features: FastAPI backend starter for VPS deployments
Automatic CRUD endpoints for custom tables

seo.title: RepoPulse — Desktop repository health scanner for developers
seo.description: RepoPulse is an open-source desktop app that scans repository health, Git state, hotspots and ignore hygiene to help teams understand codebase risks.
seo.h1: RepoPulse — Desktop repo health and Git hygiene scanner
seo.problem: RepoPulse helps developers and teams spot repository hotspots, Git inconsistencies and ignore-file hygiene issues before they become expensive maintenance problems.
features: Git state visibility and hygiene checks

seo.problem: Core Utils Desktop helps developers manage the full Core Utils toolbox from a single desktop hub with installs, updates, shortcuts and app-menu integration.
features: Install and update Core Utils tools from one hub
Settings and bilingual EN / ES support
